betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6First Nuclear Bomb§f:
The Uranium-233 Fission Bomb (trinity:bomb_u233) is the simplest nuclear weapon in Trinity. It is an implosion-type device that uses a U-233 core surrounded by compression charges to achieve critical mass.

§6Bomb Assembly Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:80)§f:
The full bomb is assembled in two stages.

§6Stage 1: Bomb Pit (TrinityRecipes.java:110)§f:
- Pattern "FFF / FNF / FFF"
- F = ingotUranium238 (tamper/reflector)
- N = trinity:neutron_initiator (Polonium-Beryllium initiator)
- Yields 1 trinity:core_u233 (U-233 Fission Bomb Core)

§6Stage 2: Bomb Assembly (TrinityRecipes.java:80)§f:
- Pattern "CCC / CNC / CCC"
- C = trinity:compression_charge (explosive lens)
- N = trinity:core_u233 (the assembled core)
- Yields 1 trinity:bomb_u233 (Uranium-233 Fission Bomb)

§6Why U-233?§f:
Uranium-233 is a fissile isotope bred from Thorium-232. Compared to U-235 or Pu-239:
- §bLower critical mass§f: smaller core needed for the same yield
- §bCleaner fission§f: produces fewer long-lived transuranic wastes
- §bEasier to breed§f: abundant Thorium in the crust

§6Compression Charge Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:75)§f:
The Compression Charge is a shaped explosive lens:
- Pattern "STB / TB / STB"
- S = ingotLead
- T = vanilla TNT
- B = trinity:solid_baratol (trinitite-based explosive)
- Yields 1 compression_charge

§6Neutron Initiator Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:77-80)§f:
The Polonium-Beryllium initiator is built in 4 parallel recipes:
- Pattern " B / BPB / B "
- P = dustPolonium, ingotPolonium, dustPolonium210, or ingotPolonium210
- B = ingotBeryllium
- Yields 1 neutron_initiator

§6Bomb Mechanics (NuclearCore.java)§f:
When the Bomb is detonated:
- All compression charges fire simultaneously, compressing the core to supercritical density
- The neutron initiator fires, releasing a burst of neutrons
- U-233 undergoes rapid fission chain reaction
- A nuclear explosion equivalent to TrinityConfig.u233_radius blocks of damage is produced
- A mushroom cloud entity spawns (EntityNuclearCloud)
- Fallout rain begins (EntityFalloutRain)
- Trinitite shards scatter across the landscape

§6Direct Descendants of U-233 Bomb (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 2 items that use the bomb in further recipes:
- trinity:compression_charge (the explosive lens)
- trinity:core_u233 (the U-233 Fission Bomb Core)

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30054 (Welcome to Trinity) — the Detonator quest.

§eTip§f: Build a remote test site at least 500 blocks from your main base. Nuclear fallout will contaminate the area around the detonation site for hundreds of blocks.

§eTip§f: Stockpile multiple U-233 cores in a Trinity weapons cache for emergency use. Each core can be assembled into a full bomb in 2 seconds.

§cWarning§f: Each Trinity bomb produces a destructive explosion comparable to multiple TNT stacks. NEVER detonate one near your base, your animals, or your friends' builds.
